sections.sectionTitle: Elifaz in Job Migilo Mahmah, ci-in Mawhsak

verses.text: Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in dawng a
“Mipil pente i cih nangawn, ama-a' ding cih lohbuang, Pasian-a' dingin a kiman'na omlo hi
Na gamtat hoihna in Pasian' phattuamna ding bangmah piangsaklo a, na hoihna in Pasian hoihsak tuanlo hi
Nangmah in Pasian na zahtakna hangin amah in nang hong taii-in hong ze-et hilo hi
Na mawhna a tamna hang, na gitlohna a liatna hang hizaw hi
Na sanggampa' leiba tangin a silh ding sitsak loin a puan teng na laksak hi
A dangtakte tui na pia nuam kei a, a gilkialte an na pia nuam kei hi
Na vangliatna leh na za liatna zangin, gam khempeuh na la khin hi
Meigongte a huh nuamlo ciang bek hiloin, mi tagahte bawlsia-in a neihsa uh na sut hi
Tua ahih manin na kimkotah thang hong kisiah a, thakhatthu-in launa in nang hong buaisak hi
Khuavak kimlai khuamial hong suak vatin khua na mu thei kei a, tuikhang in nang hong tuumcip hi
“Van a sangpen dawnah Pasian a om hi a, a sang mahmaha om aksite hong suk et lai hi
Ahi zongin nangmah in, ‘Pasian in bang thei ding ahi hiam? Meii in Pasian tuamcip hi. Eite' thu bangci-in khenthei ding ahi hiam?’ na ci hi
Van khumzangah Pasian a paikawmin meii pailetin Pasian in hong musuk theilo ding hi, ci-in na ngaihsun hi
“Migilote' gamtat ngeite mah gamtat ding ngaihsun na hi hiam
Amau' hun tunglopi-in tuikhang in amaute taii hi
Hih mite pen Pasian a nial, Pasian in bangmah a cih theilo dingin a ki-um mite ahi uh hi
Tua hita se leh amaute a daupaisak Pasian hi a, migilote' ngaihsutna pen keima ngaihsutna tawh kigamla mahmah hi
Migilote tungah gim kipia a muh uh ciangin mihoihte nuam a, paubaan'na a neilo mite in a nuihsan uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote' neih khempeuh kisuksiatsak gawp a, a omlai sunte nangawn mei in a kangtum hi
“Job aw, tu-in Pasian tawh kilem in la, amah galbawl nawn kei in. Tua hi leh amah in nang thupha hong pia ding hi
Ama hong hilhnate zui in la, ama thute ciamteh in
Lungsim tak tawh Vanglianpa lamah kihei in la, na innsung pan gamtatsia beisak in la
na kham neihte leivui bang lelin ngaihsunin, na Ofir khamte suang bang lelin ngaihsunin
Vanglian Pasian pen na kham leh na ngun hisak lecin
Pasian muan'in na nei tawntung ding a, na lungdamna bulpi amah ahihlam na thei ding hi
Thu na nget ciangin na ngetna hong pia ding a, nangma thuciamnate na tungsak ding hi
Na hih khempeuh na tangtun' ding a, na ma hong vang ding hi
Pasian in mi kiphasakte niamkhiat a, mi niamte a hon hi
Nang a mawhbaanglo, a gamtat man na hih nak leh nang hong hon ding hi,” a ci hi.
